action.reasoning: Observation: Fine-tuned model gets 0/20 on val with distances 80-130px. Training metrics show only 1 point - logging broken. Analysis: Model may not have trained well. Need to submit eval to get test score, then debug. The coordinate conversion seems correct (model outputs 0-1000, we scale to image dims), but predictions are systematically off. Decision: Submit eval with current checkpoint to get baseline, then investigate training quality and fix issues.
